verses.text: Pasian hong kipan hen la, ama galte kithehthangsak hen. Amah a mudahte ama mai-ah tai uh hen
Meikhu lengkhia bangin amaute a hawlkhia ding hi. Mei mai-ah khuainun a tui bangin Pasian' mai-ah migilote siamang ding hi
Ahih hangin midikte lungdam ding hi. Pasian' mai-ah nuamin diang ding uh a, amaute lungdam mahmahin awng-awng ding uh hi
Pasian' tungah la sa un la, ama min phatna la sa un. Meiite tungah a tuangpa la sak un. Ama min pen Topa ahi hi; ama mai-ah lungdamin diang un
Pa neilote' pa leh meigong numeite a hupa pen, a siangtho mahmah ama omna-ah a om Pasian ahi hi
Pasian in a cimawhte a ten'na ding innlelo guan' a, thongkia mite nopsakna munah a tun'pih hi. Ahih hangin mi lehdote ahih leh keugaw gamah teng uh hi
Pasian aw, nangma mite mai-ah na kuankhiat ciang, gamlak nawkin na pai ciangin
nangmah Pasian na om manin lei kiling gawpin vantungte in guah a zusak hi. Pasian ahi, Israel Pasian' omna-ah Sinai mual nangawn a kiling gawp hi
Pasian aw, na luah mite vulgawp uh ahih manin guah tampi zusakin na nosuaksak kik hi
Nangma mihonte in tua sungah omna ding mu uh hi. Pasian aw, nangma hoihna tawh a cimawh mite' kisapna a kicingin na guan' hi
Topa in thu pia hi: Hih thu a pua mihonte tam mahmah uh a
“Kumpipa' galkapte tai uh!” ci uh hi. Inn-a om nupite in galte' van a kisutte hawm uh a, tua vante pen
ngun tawh a kizut vakhu limte hi a, a khate kham tawh kizut hi. Bang hangin note pawlkhat, tuukhawk sungah mawk om na hi uh hiam
Vanglianpa in tua gam panin kumpite a nawhkeek ciangin Zalmon mualtungah vuk a kia tawh kibang hi
Aw mual lianpi, Bashan mual, aw mual dawnzum tampi a nei Bashan mual
Dawnzum tampi a nei mual aw, Pasian in ama omna dingin a deih mual Pasian' om tawntungna ding mun bang hangin simmawh et na hi hiam
Leeng muan'huai tul sawmnih, vantung mi a tultul tawh, Sinai mual pan siangtho munah Topa hong pai hi
Topa nangmah Pasian tua munah na om theihna dingin a sangna-ah kahto-in salte na paipih a, mihonte leh mi lehdote' tung nangawn panin piakkhong nate na ngah hi
Nisimin eite-a' dingin a hong thuaksak Topa in thupha ngah ta hen. Pasian pen eite hong honkhiapa ahi hi
Eite' Pasian pen hong honkhia Pasian hi a, sihna pan a hong suaktasak Topa Pasian ahi hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in mawhna a gamta a galte' lutang khempeuh sukham ding hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note in sisan sungah na khe uh silin, na uite un galte' sisan a liak theihna dingin Bashan mual panin galte lakhia kikin, tuipi thuk sung panin ka kaikhia kik ding hi,” a ci hi
Pasian aw, ka Kumpipa, keima Pasian, a zahtakhuai takin biakinn sungah na paina kimu hi
A masa-in lasate, a nunungin tamngai tumte, a laizangah nungak khuangtumte in
“Israel' suanlekhakte aw, mipi kikhopna sungah Topa Pasian phat un!” ci uh hi
Amaute' lakah a mi tawmpen Benjamin-te a mapi-in om a, amau' zomah Judah kumpite leh a mite, Naftali kumpite leh a mite ahi uh hi
Pasian aw, na vangliatna kilangsak in. Kote-a' dingin a hong bawlsak Pasian aw, na thahatna hong lak in
Jerusalem-a na biakinn hangin kumpite in nang tungah letsong hong puak uh hi
Pumpeeng laka teng Egypt mite — tua ganhingte, bawngtal hon, bawngnote taigawp in. Siah a lunggulhte tuancil in la, gal a uuk mite thehthang gawp in
Egypt gam panin sumngo lakhiasak in la, Pasian' tungah thungetna-in Ethiopia gam a khut zansak mengmeng in
Leitung kumpi gamte aw, Pasian' tungah la sa un. Vantung, tanglai vantunga a tuang Topa phatna la sa un. Ngai un, ama aw, a vanglian mahmah ama aw hong gingkhiasak hi
Israel-te' tungah a lian, Pasian' hatna pahtawi un; ama vangliatna vantungah om hi
Israel-te' Pasian, ama biakinn sungah zahtakhuai mahmah a, ama mite tungah vangliatna leh hatna a pia hi. Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen!
